HELLO HAI HAI!! this is my first bot and i really tried so i hope people like it!! anyways im gonna have a little yap session so like sorry for yapping now anyways HERE

HI!! as mentioned above its my first bot and im quite proud of it!! please leave reviews and you can say if you like it or dislike it, recommend things to improve, and requests are in my bio if you want that too! anyways after a year of being on janitor, i finally made a bot- ive been wanting to but had no motivation + courage to do so because you know how some people can be rude..and the fact that i have a hard time writing. but i still made like 8 bots that are private and work really well for myself so i guess not that much? oh well! BAHAHHAH ok anyways like yea! also im sorry if things are out of character,,, anyways so like im rlly happy be bye and most importantly, have fun!

also she lives at an apartment in this so its like half normal world and half hsr world??? idrk if you get what i mean but you’ll probablt get what i mean when you read the message and stuff☹️😕😞😞
